notes: Device is powered entirely via 802.3af PoE Class 1 through the RJ45 port — there is no separate power connector. Network speed confirmed as 100Mbps (Fast Ethernet / 100Base-T) per Audinate AVIO platform documentation. XLR connectors are female (input). No USB, no barrel jack, no other ports. Supports up to 24-bit/96kHz audio. Also compatible with AES67.

ports.name: Analog In 1
ports.note: Balanced analog audio input, XLR female (3-pin)

ports.name: Analog In 2
ports.note: Balanced analog audio input, XLR female (3-pin)

ports.name: Dante / PoE
ports.note: Dante audio network (100Base-T); also delivers power via 802.3af PoE Class 1 — no separate power connector on the device
